title: 8 fixes — Search race conditions, empty states, stale-write guards
notes: FIX: Search results no longer flicker between queries — when you type fast, the slower previous query result was overwriting the newer one. Now uses sequence guards (HomeScreen, SearchScreen, MessagesScreen).
FIX: People search in Messages now properly debounced (300ms) — no more spamming Supabase with one query per keystroke.
POLISH: People search now shows 'No people found' empty state instead of just disappearing.
POLISH: Feed empty state — when you have zero posts visible (after filters), now shows clear 'No posts to show' message instead of blank space.
POLISH: Country picker + Timezone picker now show 'No matches found' when search has no results, instead of just empty list.
POLISH: Hashtag search no-match state — clear 'No posts with #hashtag' message instead of empty feed.
FIX: Followers/Following list — when modal closes mid-search, the stale typed query no longer leaks into the next open.
FIX: New-message search panel now properly clears search state when you toggle the panel closed and reopen.
